title: flaky indulgent mexican bulgur tacos
description: veracruzan-inspired dish featuring flaky bulgur, dashi broth, and sautéed mushrooms. perfect for a special occasion or a delicious weekend brunch

ingredients.name: bulgur wheat
ingredients.notes: fine or medium grain works best

ingredients.name: mushrooms
ingredients.notes: button, cremini, or shiitake work well

ingredients.name: grated cheese
ingredients.notes: cotija or feta for a salty kick

instructions: soak bulgur in water for at least 30 minutes, or according to package instructions
drain and rinse bulgur, then transfer to a large bowl
add dashi extract, grated cheese, chopped cilantro, lime juice, and olive oil to the bowl, and mix well
heat a large skillet over medium-high heat, and add a tablespoon of olive oil
add mushrooms to the skillet, and sauté until tender and lightly browned, about 5 minutes
add salsa to the skillet, and stir to combine
warm tortillas by wrapping them in a damp paper towel and microwaving for 20-30 seconds
assemble tacos by placing a spoonful of bulgur mixture onto a tortilla, followed by a spoonful of sautéed mushrooms and salsa
top with a dollop of sour cream, if desired
